jobs.title: Lead, Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: L3Harris is dedicated to recruiting and developing high-performing talent who are passionate about what they do. Our employees are unified in a shared dedication to our customers’ mission and quest for professional growth. L3Harris provides an inclusive, engaging environment designed to empower employees and promote work-life success. jobs.title: ASSOCIATE PRODUCT MANAGER, MERCHANDISING
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Job Description Pay Range: $75,000 - $105,000 At The Home Depot Canada, we want you to feel valued and supported. The pay range you see represents base salary only. In addition, your total rewards may include: semi-annual bonuses tied to business performance; Deferred Profit-Sharing Program to assist with retirement savings; comprehensive paid benefits; a 15% discount on Home Depot stock purchases; and merit-based salary increases. We are committed to recognizing your efforts and supporting you…

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager (vPAC)
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Job Description Summary Job Description Senior Product Manager - vPAC | Grid Automation & Software | Stafford, UK Are you ready to help shape the future of grid automation - defining how protection, automation and control evolves from dedicated hardware into software-defined infrastructure for the world’s electricity networks? jobs.title: Technical Product Manager – B2B Technology
jobs.descriptionSnippet: We are partnering with an innovative Quebec-based technology company that develops advanced hardware and software solutions for mission-critical environments where reliability, performance, and user experience are essential. As the company continues to grow, they are looking to add a Product Manager who will serve as the bridge between engineering, customers, and commercial teams to accelerate product development, market adoption, and long-term commercial success. jobs.title: Responsable Produit - Digital Substation Product Manager H/F
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Job Description Summary Nous recherchons un(e) leader innovant et expérimenté pour piloter la vision, la stratégie et l'exécution de nos solutions d'automatisation des postes électriques numériques et conventionnels. Le/la Responsable Produit sera chargé(e) de définir l'orientation du portefeuille d'automatisation des postes, d'assurer sa différenciation concurrentielle et de favoriser sa croissance sur les marchés mondiaux. jobs.title: Senior Product Manager – E-commerce and Digital Customer Experience (Hybrid)
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Our Hybrid Workplace Policy establishes that associates need to have a reliable transportation to and from our corporate head office located in Boucherville (Quebec), to come to the office on a regular basis.
